nasb.text: Obil the Ishmaelite had charge of the camels; and Jehdeiah the Meronothite had charge of the donkeys.

esv.text: Over the camels was Obil the Ishmaelite; and over the donkeys was Jehdeiah the Meronothite. Over the flocks was Jaziz the Hagrite.

cnv.text: 管理駱駝的，是以實瑪利人阿比勒；管理驢群的，是米崙人耶希底亞；

ccb.text: 以实玛利人阿比勒管理骆驼群。米仑人耶希底亚管理驴群。
